changeSet.author: Alex
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE public.utm_logstash_filter SET filter_version='3.1.1', logstash_filter=$$ # Windows_Agent filter, version 3.1.1 # Based on winlogbeat fields, reference [8.15] # See https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/beats/winlogbeat/current/exported-fields-winlog.html
pipeline: - dataTypes: - wineventlog steps: - json: source: raw
# Renaming useful fields - rename: from: - log.providerguid to: log.providerGuid
- rename: from: - log.data.PrivilegeList to: log.eventDataPrivilegeList
- rename: from: - log.data.ServiceName to: log.eventDataServiceName
- rename: from: - log.data.SubjectDomainName to: log.eventDataSubjectDomainName
- rename: from: - log.data.SubjectLogonId to: log.eventDataSubjectLogonId
- rename: from: - log.data.SubjectUserName to: log.eventDataSubjectUserName
- rename: from: - log.data.SubjectUserSid to: log.eventDataSubjectUserSid
- rename: from: - log.data.PrivilegeList to: log.eventDataPrivilegeList
- rename: from: - log.data.ClientProcessId to: log.eventDataClientProcessId
- rename: from: - log.data.Flags to: log.eventDataFlags
- rename: from: - log.data.Identity to: log.eventDataIdentity
- rename: from: - log.data.ProcessCreationTime to: log.eventDataProcessCreationTime
- rename: from: - log.id to: log.eventId
- rename: from: - log.data.Resource to: log.eventDataResource
- rename: from: - log.data.ReturnCode to: log.eventDataReturnCode
- rename: from: - log.data.Resource to: log.eventDataResource
- rename: from: - log.data.Schema to: log.eventDataSchema
- rename: from: - log.data.SchemaFriendlyName to: log.eventDataSchemaFriendlyName
- rename: from: - log.data.Resource to: log.eventDataResource
- rename: from: - log.data.AuthenticationPackageName to: log.eventDataAuthenticationPackageName
- rename: from: - log.data.ElevatedToken to: log.eventDataElevatedToken
- rename: from: - log.data.ImpersonationLevel to: log.eventDataImpersonationLevel
- rename: from: - log.wineventlog.data.FailureReason to: log.eventDataFailureReason
- rename: from: - log.data.IpAddress to: origin.ip
- rename: from: - log.data.IpPort to: log.eventDataIpPort
- rename: from: - log.data.Resource to: log.eventDataResource
- rename: from: - log.data.KeyLength to: log.eventDataKeyLength
- rename: from: - log.data.LmPackageName to: log.eventDataLmPackageName
- rename: from: - log.data.LogonProcessName to: log.eventDataLogonProcessName
- rename: from: - log.data.LogonType to: log.eventDataLogonType - rename: from: - log.data.Resource to: log.eventDataResource
- rename: from: - log.data.ProcessId to: log.eventDataProcessId
- rename: from: - log.data.ProcessName to: log.eventDataProcessName
- rename: from: - log.data.RestrictedAdminMode to: log.eventDataRestrictedAdminMode
- rename: from: - log.data.TargetDomainName to: target.domain
- rename: from: - log.data.TargetLinkedLogonId to: log.eventDataTargetLinkedLogonId
- rename: from: - log.data.Resource to: log.eventDataResource
- rename: from: - log.data.TargetLogonId to: log.eventDataTargetLogonId
- rename: from: - log.data.TargetOutboundDomainName to: log.eventDataTargetOutboundDomainName
- rename: from: - log.data.TargetOutboundUserName to: log.eventDataTargetOutboundUserName
- rename: from: - log.data.TargetUserName to: target.user
- rename: from: - log.data.TargetUserSid to: log.eventDataTargetUserSid
- rename: from: - log.data.TransmittedServices to: log.eventDataTransmittedServices
- rename: from: - log.data.VirtualAccount to: log.eventDataVirtualAccount
- rename: from: - log.data.WorkstationName to: origin.host
- rename: from: - log.data.FailureReason to: log.eventDataFailureReason
- rename: from: - log.data.AccessMask to: log.eventDataAccessMask
- rename: from: - log.data.Status to: log.eventDataStatus
- rename: from: - log.process.thread to: log.processThread
- rename: from: - log.execution.ThreadID to: log.processThreadId
- rename: from: - log.process.pid to: log.processPid
- rename: from: - log.providername to: log.providerName
- rename: from: - log.record_id to: log.recordId
- rename: from: - log.task to: log.task
- rename: from: - log.event.code to: log.eventCode
- rename: from: - log.event.kind to: log.eventKind
- rename: from: - log.event.provider to: log.event.provider
- rename: from: - log.log.level to: log.severityLabel
- rename: from: - log.api to: log.api
- rename: from: - log.channel to: log.channel
- rename: from: - log.ecs.version to: log.ecsVersion
- rename: from: - log.correlation.ActivityID to: log.activityId
- rename: from: - log.data.LogonGuid to: log.logonGuid
- rename: from: - log.execution.ProcessID to: log.executionProcessID
- rename: from: - log.data.ObjectType to: log.eventDataObjectType
- rename: from: - log.data.AccessList to: log.eventDataAccessList
- rename: from: - log.data.HandleId to: log.eventDataHandleId
- rename: from: - log.data.ObjectName to: log.eventDataObjectName
- rename: from: - log.data.ResourceAttributes to: log.eventDataResourceAttributes
- rename: from: - log.data.OldSd to: log.eventDataOldSd
- rename: from: - log.data.NewSd to: log.eventDataNewSd
- rename: from: - log.data.ObjectServer to: log.eventDataObjectServer
- rename: from: - log.data.TransactionId to: log.eventDataTransactionId
- cast: to: "int" fields: - log.eventCode
- trim: function: prefix substring: '{' fields: - log.providerGuid - log.activityId - log.logonGuid - log.eventDataSchema - log.processThread - log.eventDataTransactionId
- trim: function: suffix substring: '}' fields: - log.providerGuid - log.activityId - log.logonGuid - log.eventDataSchema - log.processThread - log.eventDataTransactionId
# Drop unnecessary events - drop: where: "oneOf('log.eventCode', [0, 1, 43, 44, 1040, 1042, 1105, 1500, 1501, 4608, 4609, 4614, 4615, 4616, 4626, 4627, 4650, 4651, 4652, 4653, 4654, 4655, 4659, 4665, 4666, 4667, 4668, 4688, 4689, 4696, 4709, 4710, 4711, 4712, 4778, 4779, 4826, 4864, 4866, 4898, 4899, 4902, 4904, 4905, 4906, 4909, 4910, 4911, 4928, 4929, 4930, 4931, 4932, 4933, 4934, 4935, 4936, 4937, 4944, 4945, 4951, 4952, 4953, 4957, 4958, 4965, 4979, 4980, 4981, 4982, 4983, 4984, 4985, 5024, 5027, 5028, 5029, 5033, 5034, 5035, 5038, 5039, 5051, 5056, 5057, 5058, 5059, 5060, 5061, 5062, 5063, 5064, 5065, 5066, 5067, 5068, 5069, 5070, 5071, 5120, 5121, 5122, 5123, 5125, 5126, 5127, 5137, 5138, 5139, 5141, 5145, 5168, 5169, 5170, 5376, 5377, 5378, 5379, 5380, 5381, 5440, 5441, 5442, 5443, 5444, 5446, 5450, 5451, 5452, 5456, 5457, 5458, 5459, 5460, 5461, 5462, 5463, 5464, 5465, 5466, 5467, 5468, 5471, 5472, 5473, 5474, 5477, 5478, 5712, 5888, 5889, 5890, 6145, 6274, 6275, 6281, 6400, 6401, 6402, 6403, 6405, 6406, 6407, 6408, 6409, 6410, 6417, 6418, 6423, 6424, 7040, 8191, 10000, 10010, 16384, 16394, 24578, 24579, 24581, 24582, 24583, 24584, 24586, 24588, 24592, 24593, 24594, 24595, 24621])"
# Decoding event code - add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A product has been installed successfully' where: equals("log.eventCode", 1033)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'The event logging service has shut down' where: equals("log.eventCode", 1100)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'Audit events have been dropped by the transport.' where: equals("log.eventCode", 1101)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'The audit log was cleared' where: equals("log.eventCode", 1102)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'The security Log is now full' where: equals("log.eventCode", 1104)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'The event logging service encountered an error' where: equals("log.eventCode", 1108)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A PowerShell script block has been executed and the script text has been logged to the event viewer.' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4104)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An authentication package has been loaded by the Local Security Authority' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4610)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A trusted logon process has been registered with the Local Security Authority' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4611)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'Internal resources allocated for the queuing of audit messages have been exhausted: leading to the loss of some audits.' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4612)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A monitored security event pattern has occurred' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4618)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'Administrator recovered system from CrashOnAuditFail' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4621)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A security package has been loaded by the Local Security Authority.' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4622)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An account was successfully logged on' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4624)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An account failed to log on' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4625)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An account was logged off' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4634)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'IKE DoS-prevention mode started' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4646)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'User initiated logoff' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4647)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A logon was attempted using explicit credentials' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4648)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A replay attack was detected' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4649)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A handle to an object was requested' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4656)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A registry value was modified' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4657)

- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An object was deleted' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4660)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'A handle to an object was requested' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4661)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An operation was performed on an object' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4662)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An attempt was made to access an object' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4663)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An attempt was made to create a hard link' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4664)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'Permissions on an object were changed' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4670)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'An application attempted to access a blocked ordinal through the TBS' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4671)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.eventName value: 'Special privileges assigned to new logon' where: equals("log.eventCode", 4672)

# Decoding the "AccessMask" field when the event code is 4663 and adding the "accessType" and "accessDescription" field - add: function: 'string' params: key: log.accessType value: 'read' where: equals("log.eventDataAccessMask", "1") && equals("log.eventCode", 4663)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.accessDescription value: 'For a file object, the right to read the corresponding file data. For a directory object, the right to read the corresponding directory data.\n For a directory, the right to list the contents of the directory.\n For registry objects, this is, Query key value.' where: equals("log.eventDataAccessMask", "1") && equals("log.eventCode", 4663)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.accessType value: 'write' where: equals("log.eventDataAccessMask", "2") && equals("log.eventCode", 4663)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.accessDescription value: 'For a file object, the right to write data to the file.\n For a directory object, the right to create a file in the directory.\n For registry objects, this is, Set key value.' where: equals("log.eventDataAccessMask", "2") && equals("log.eventCode", 4663)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.accessType value: 'append' where: equals("log.eventDataAccessMask", "4") && equals("log.eventCode", 4663)
- add: function: 'string' params: key: log.accessDescription value: 'For a file object, the right to append data to the file. - add: function: 'string' params: key: log.accessType value: 'access_sys_sec' where: equals("log.eventDataAccessMask", "16777216") && equals("log.eventCode", 4663)
